title: Umea Heavy Rain
lead: Umea is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.03. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly.
body:
The heavy rain in Umea is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 89% and low wind speed of 4.3 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 11.6 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG indicate a significant impact on heating and energy demand.
conclusion: Implement emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
